status.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 50MB.
status.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Only .docx files are supported.
status.loadFailed: Failed to load, please try again
status.noFile: Please select a DOCX file to preview

error.microphoneNotReadable: Microphone device is occupied or cannot be accessed
error.microphoneNotSupported: Current browser does not support recording functionality
error.microphoneOverconstrained: Microphone device does not support the required audio format
error.microphonePermissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access in settings.

app.android: Settings → App Permissions → Microphone → Magic → Allow
app.default: Please find app permission management in phone settings and allow Magic app to access microphone
app.ios: Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone → Magic → Allow

browser.chrome: Click the lock icon on the left side of the address bar → Select "Site Settings" → Allow microphone permission
browser.default: Please find privacy or permission settings in your browser settings and allow this site to access the microphone
browser.edge: Click the lock icon on the left side of the address bar → Select "Permissions" → Allow microphone permission
browser.firefox: Click the shield or lock icon on the left side of the address bar → Select "Permissions" → Allow microphone permission
browser.safari: Safari Menu → Preferences → Websites → Microphone → Select this site and allow access

app.content: This feature requires access to your microphone. Please allow microphone permission in phone settings.
app.manualInstruction: Please allow Magic app to access microphone in phone settings and try again.
app.title: Microphone Permission Required

browser.content: This feature requires access to your microphone. Please follow these steps to allow microphone permission in browser settings:
browser.manualInstruction: After completing the settings, please refresh the page and try again.
browser.title: Microphone Permission Required
